title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at SFC Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at SFC Group
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
